headline: The Bull Case For Garmin (GRMN) Could Change Following New Sonar And Watch Messaging Launches
summary: In early March 2026, Garmin introduced a high-end 360-degree scanning sonar and Spy Pole system for anglers, alongside a new WhatsApp app for compatible smartwatches that enables wrist-based messaging via the Connect IQ Store. Together, these launches highlight Garmin’s push to deepen its ecosystem in both marine electronics and connected wearables, potentially strengthening its recurring customer engagement. We’ll now examine how Garmin’s new 360-degree sonar platform could influence the...
